title: Story Plan — film structure (Phase B / node 7)
description: Contract for analysis/story_plan.json. Turns the chosen direction + director notes into the film's five-act structure: Opening → Love Story → Ceremony → Family & Friends → Ending. Each segment names its goal, feeling, rhythm, which photo content to pull, a caption idea, and ONE priority effect from the engine whitelist. Emphasis is a coarse enum (low/medium/high), NOT a duration — the timeline node computes real durations from music energy. Guardrail: segments come from the fixed ordered set, emotion/effect are enum-clamped, tags filtered to the controlled vocabulary.

segment.description: Which act. Unique and in canonical order.

goal.description: What this act should accomplish for the viewer.

emphasis.description: Relative screen-time weight — a creative dial, NOT a duration.

photoTags.description: Which content tags this act draws from (controlled vocabulary).

priorityEffect.description: One effect enum to lean on in this act (see timeline.schema.json $defs/effect); runtime guardrail enforces validity.

captionIdea.description: A caption direction (theme, not final copy).
